positive: A whimsical, storybook illustration of a sleepy red fox curled up in a patch of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, surrounded by delicate ferns and dew-kissed moss. The scene is set in a magical, enchanted forest clearing. Style: Detailed watercolor painting, Studio Ghibli aesthetic, Cottagecore, highly intricate details, soft volumetric lighting, golden hour glow, bokeh background, cinematic depth of field, fantasy art, trending on ArtStation, hyperdetailed, 8k resolution.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grainy, monochrome, harsh shadows, oversaturated, creepy
